summary: Comprehensive testing of ReversePicks bug fixes: 1) International team categories (league IDs corrected), 2) Player photos removed from search cards, 3) POTD loading layout (no jank), 4) Nationality display with icon. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified all fixes working. Found and fixed backend SUPPORTED_LEAGUES mismatch.

minor.issue: Backend SUPPORTED_LEAGUES had wrong league IDs (was using old incorrect mapping). Fixed to match frontend.

passed_tests: Backend: WCQ UEFA (league 32) returns European teams (Belgium, France, Croatia, Sweden, Spain)
Backend: WCQ CONMEBOL (league 34) returns South American teams (Brazil, Argentina, Uruguay, Colombia, Peru)
Backend: WCQ AFC (league 30) returns Asian teams (Japan, South Korea, Australia, Iran, Saudi Arabia)
Backend: WCQ CAF (league 29) returns African teams (Senegal, Nigeria, Tunisia, Morocco, Egypt)
Backend: Euro Qualifiers (league 960) returns European teams
Backend: Donnarumma search returns full name 'Gianluigi Donnarumma' with Italy nationality
Backend: Messi search returns 'Lionel Andrés Messi Cuccittini' at Inter Miami
Backend: Salah search with EPL (league 39) returns Mohamed Salah at Liverpool with Egypt nationality
Backend: Player search returns photo URL (backend provides, frontend doesn't display)
Backend: Owner auto-login (josselj001@gmail.com) bypasses password - returns session token
Backend: POTD endpoint returns available pick with player data
Backend: Leagues endpoint returns correct league IDs (32=UEFA, 34=CONMEBOL, 30=AFC, 29=CAF, 960=Euro Qual)
Frontend: Owner auto-login works - main app loads without password
Frontend: POTD card loads smoothly with fade-in animation (no layout jank)
Frontend: Player search shows User icon avatar (no player photos)
Frontend: Player search shows nationality before team (e.g., 'Egypt · Liverpool')
Frontend: WCQ UEFA wizard shows European teams as opponents (Belgium, France, Croatia, Sweden, Spain)
Frontend: Full EPL wizard flow works (Salah > Liverpool opponent > venue > prop > line > projection)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend SUPPORTED_LEAGUES was out of sync with frontend api.js - now fixed to match
League ID mapping: 32=WCQ UEFA, 34=WCQ CONMEBOL, 30=WCQ AFC, 29=WCQ CAF, 33=WCQ OFC, 960=Euro Qualifiers
Player photos removed from UI but backend still returns photo URLs (not breaking, just unused)
POTD skeleton has min-height 280px to prevent layout shift during loading
Nationality displayed as text before team name with '·' separator
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 bug fixes verified: 1) International team categories now correct (WCQ UEFA=32 shows European teams, CONMEBOL=34 shows South American, etc.), 2) Player photos removed from search cards (User icon shown instead), 3) POTD loads smoothly with skeleton and fade-in, 4) Nationality shown as text before team name. Backend SUPPORTED_LEAGUES was fixed to match frontend. Full wizard flow tested end-to-end.

fix_1_international_teams.verification: API returns correct teams for each confederation

fix_2_player_photos_removed.description: Player search cards show User icon instead of player photos
fix_2_player_photos_removed.verification: UI shows .player-avatar with User icon, no .player-photo elements

fix_3_potd_loading.description: POTD card loads smoothly with skeleton and fade-in animation
fix_3_potd_loading.verification: No layout jank observed, skeleton has min-height 280px

fix_4_nationality_display.description: Nationality shown as text before team name (e.g., 'Egypt · Liverpool')
fix_4_nationality_display.verification: UI shows .player-nationality element with country name
